items.name: AI Ethics Specialist
items.summary: Evaluates AI systems for fairness, bias, transparency, and compliance with ethical guidelines and regulations.
failure_modes: assesses fairness without defining protected attributes

items.name: AI Product Manager
items.summary: Defines AI product strategy, prioritizes ML initiatives, and bridges business requirements with technical feasibility.
failure_modes: defines AI features without measuring user impact

items.name: AI Research Scientist
items.summary: Conducts AI research including novel architectures, training methods, and theoretical analysis with reproducible experiments.

items.name: Analytics Engineer
items.summary: Builds analytics pipelines and metrics layers.
triggers: analytics engineer test and documentation plan

items.name: BI Developer
items.summary: Builds business intelligence solutions including dashboards, OLAP cubes, and self-service analytics platforms.
failure_modes: builds dashboards without understanding data model

items.name: Computer Vision Engineer
items.summary: Designs and implements computer vision systems including image classification, object detection, segmentation, and visual search.
failure_modes: ignores class imbalance in image datasets
skips edge case testing (occlusion, lighting, scale)

items.name: Data Analyst
items.summary: Performs data analysis, reporting, and visualization to support business decisions with statistical rigor.

items.name: Data Engineer
items.summary: Designs and operates data pipelines, ETL processes, and storage systems for reliable data ingestion and transformation.

items.name: Data Scientist
items.summary: Applies statistical modeling, exploratory analysis, and ML techniques to extract insights from structured and unstructured data.
failure_modes: draws conclusions without checking data quality

items.name: Eval Engineer
items.summary: Builds reproducible LLM/agent eval harnesses with regression-blocking gates.
failure_modes: cherry-picked test examples instead of representative sample
regression eval that depends on non-deterministic graders without checks

items.name: GraphRAG Engineer
items.summary: Designs and evaluates graph-augmented retrieval systems using knowledge graphs and community detection for improved RAG quality.
failure_modes: builds graph without measuring retrieval improvement over baseline
ignores graph construction cost and latency

items.name: LLM Fine-Tuner
items.summary: Fine-tunes large language models using LoRA, QLoRA, and full fine-tuning with careful data curation and evaluation.
failure_modes: fine-tunes without proper eval set isolation

items.name: Data & AI Master
items.summary: Orchestrates data engineering, ML/AI, RAG, eval, and analytics tasks; delegates to specialists.
triggers: evaluate our model on a held-out set with model evaluation
build a rag pipeline for our docs
failure_modes: confuses business analytics (route to product-business) with data engineering
dispatches RAG tasks without checking existing retrieval layer
skips eval gate before promoting a model change

items.name: ML Engineer
items.summary: Designs and operates ML training, fine-tuning, serving, and inference pipelines with reproducibility and monitoring.
failure_modes: launches training without a held-out eval split
bakes training-time data leakage into the pipeline

items.name: MLOps Engineer
items.summary: Operates ML lifecycle automation including CI/CD for models, feature stores, model registries, and production monitoring.

items.name: NLP Engineer
items.summary: Designs and implements NLP systems including text classification, NER, sentiment analysis, and language generation pipelines.
failure_modes: ignores label imbalance in text data

items.name: Prompt Engineer
items.summary: Designs, tests, and optimizes prompts for LLMs with systematic evaluation and version control.
failure_modes: skips edge case and adversarial testing

items.name: RAG Engineer
items.summary: Designs and tunes retrieval-augmented generation pipelines with measured retrieval quality before generation quality.
failure_modes: tunes generation before retrieval is measurably good
skips eval harness build before A/B comparisons
picks an embedding model without latency/cost analysis

items.name: Recommendation Engineer
items.summary: Designs and evaluates recommendation systems using collaborative filtering, content-based, and hybrid approaches.
failure_modes: evaluates only on accuracy ignoring diversity and serendipity

items.name: Accessibility Auditor
items.summary: Audits product surfaces for keyboard support, semantics, contrast, and assistive-technology usability.
triggers: wcag 2.2 compliance check for the app
inclusive design review for the signup flow
a11y remediation plan for the navigation
screen reader testing for the data table
failure_modes: reports accessibility without checking interaction paths
lists issues without severity or remediation
confuses visual polish with accessible behavior

items.name: Brand Designer
items.summary: Creates brand identity systems including logos, color palettes, typography, and brand application guidelines.
triggers: visual identity refresh for the platform
brand application design for social media
brand guidelines creation for the company
logo design system for the product
brand identity design for the new startup

items.name: Brand Strategist
items.summary: Designs brand architecture, visual identity systems, and brand voice guidelines with strategic positioning.

tone consistency review across all pages
style guide compliance check on the docs
copy review and refinement for the homepage
editing pass on the blog post draft

items.summary: Develops content strategies including audience analysis, content audits, editorial calendars, and governance frameworks.
triggers: audience content mapping for new segments
content governance framework for the team
content audit for the help documentation
develop a content strategy for the blog

product messaging for the new feature launch
marketing copy draft for the landing page
write product copy for the pricing page
failure_modes: writes copy without brand voice alignment

create a new design system for the platform

animation principles definition for the brand

seo blog post draft about machine learning
keyword targeted content for the product page
search optimized blog post about devops
write seo optimized article about cloud computing

create runbook for the deployment process

design user flows for checkout process

items.summary: Crafts visual language including color palettes, typography scales, iconography, and imagery systems.
triggers: create a visual style guide for marketing
build an iconography system for the app
design a typography scale for the website
create a color palette for the brand
design a visual language for the product

items.summary: Guides learners through academic planning, course selection, degree pathways, and career-aligned educational decisions.
failure_modes: ignores prerequisite chains in course planning
omits career alignment in academic recommendations

items.name: Assessment Designer
items.summary: Designs formative and summative assessments with clear mastery criteria and feedback loops.

items.summary: Designs comprehensive assessment systems including standardized tests, performance assessments, and program-level evaluation frameworks.
failure_modes: designs assessment without validity evidence plan

items.name: Curriculum Designer
items.summary: Builds standards-aligned learning paths, lesson sequences, and objective ladders for a defined learner level.

items.summary: Analyzes education policies, regulatory frameworks, and institutional governance to inform decision-making and compliance in educational settings.
failure_modes: analyzes policy without stakeholder impact assessment
ignores equity implications in policy recommendations
omits implementation feasibility in compliance plans

items.name: Education Researcher
items.summary: Designs and interprets educational research studies, literature reviews, and evidence-based practice evaluations to inform teaching and learning.
failure_modes: designs research without ethical review considerations

items.name: Educational Technologist
items.summary: Evaluates and integrates educational technology tools, platforms, and digital learning environments to enhance teaching and learning.

items.name: Instructional Designer
items.summary: Designs engaging learning experiences using evidence-based instructional strategies, multimedia principles, and learner-centered approaches.
failure_modes: ignores cognitive load in experience design

items.name: Learning Analyst
items.summary: Analyzes learner data, engagement metrics, and learning outcomes to inform instructional decisions and improve program effectiveness.

items.name: Education Master
items.summary: Orchestrates curriculum design, learning assessment, personalized tutoring, and LMS-pattern tasks; age/grade-level aware.
triggers: design a curriculum design plan for grade 9 python
failure_modes: ignores age/grade level constraint and emits over-complex content
mixes corporate L&D with K-12 patterns inappropriately
skips assessment design when curriculum is requested

items.name: Online Educator
items.summary: Designs and facilitates online and blended learning experiences using best practices in digital pedagogy and virtual engagement.
failure_modes: designs online course without engagement strategy
ignores time zone and accessibility barriers

items.name: Special Education Specialist
items.summary: Designs inclusive learning experiences, IEP-aligned instruction, and accommodations for learners with diverse needs and abilities.
failure_modes: ignores IEP goals in instruction planning

items.name: Student Success Specialist
items.summary: Designs retention strategies, early alert systems, and support interventions to improve student persistence, completion, and overall success.
failure_modes: designs retention without identifying risk factors

items.name: Tutor Agent
items.summary: Designs personalized tutoring interventions and hint ladders around an explicit learner gap and support plan.
failure_modes: jumps to answers instead of scaffolding
omits teacher or parent handoff context where needed

items.name: Software Architect
items.summary: Designs system architecture, evaluates trade-offs, and writes architecture decision records.
triggers: we need a high level design

items.name: Backend API Developer
items.summary: Designs and implements REST and GraphQL APIs with proper versioning, pagination, error handling, and documentation.
failure_modes: inconsistent error response shapes across endpoints
missing pagination on list endpoints returning large datasets
over-fetching or under-fetching in GraphQL resolvers
missing input validation on request bodies

items.name: Build Error Resolver
items.summary: Resolves build and compilation errors.
triggers: I hit a build error in CI
failure_modes: cannot resolve complex library dependency mismatches

items.name: Code Migration Specialist
items.summary: Plans and executes large-scale code migrations including framework upgrades, language rewrites, and API version transitions.
triggers: plan the next.js pages to app router migration
handle breaking changes in api v3
failure_modes: migrates too many files at once without incremental validation
misses transitive breaking changes in sub-dependencies
loses behavioral parity between old and new implementations
no rollback plan if migration fails mid-way

items.name: Code Reviewer
items.summary: Reviews code quality, maintainability, and styling.

items.name: C++ Reviewer
items.summary: Reviews C++ code for memory safety, RAII compliance, undefined behaviour, and alignment with the ISO C++ Core Guidelines.

items.name: Database Schema Design Specialist
items.summary: Designs normalized database schemas, plans migrations, and models data relationships for relational and NoSQL systems.
triggers: plan the migration from v2 to v3 schema
entity relationship diagram for users and teams
failure_modes: misses foreign key or referential integrity constraints

items.name: Database Query Optimization Specialist
items.summary: Analyzes slow queries, optimizes indexes, and improves database performance through execution plan analysis and query rewriting.
triggers: n plus one problem in orders
failure_modes: adds indexes without measuring write overhead
optimizes a query that is not the actual bottleneck
recommends engine-specific syntax without confirming database type
ignores connection pooling or query caching layers

items.name: Development Workflow Optimization Specialist
items.summary: Optimizes development workflows including CI/CD pipelines, git branching strategies, code review processes, and developer tooling.
failure_modes: over-engineers workflow for a small team
recommends tools the team cannot adopt
ignores existing conventions and team capacity
optimizes local steps without measuring end-to-end cycle time

items.name: Docs Updater
items.summary: Updates documentation, READMEs, and API docs to match current code behavior.
failure_modes: documents intended behavior instead of actual behavior
leaves stale examples that no longer run
invents API surface that does not exist

items.name: E2E Test Runner
items.summary: Writes and runs end-to-end browser tests using Playwright or agent-browser for critical user flows.
failure_modes: writes tests that only work in a specific environment
flaky selectors that break on minor UI changes
skips assertions on critical success criteria

items.name: React Component Developer
items.summary: Builds React components, hooks, and pages with proper composition, state management, accessibility, and testing.
triggers: write tests for react modal component
implement react page with data fetching
create custom hook for form validation
build react component for user profile card
failure_modes: unnecessary re-renders from improper hook dependencies or missing memoization
accessibility violations from missing ARIA attributes or keyboard navigation
prop drilling instead of proper composition or context usage
untested interactive behavior and edge cases
inconsistent styling approach within the project

items.name: Vue Component Developer
items.summary: Builds Vue 3 components, composables, and pages using Composition API with proper reactivity, accessibility, and testing.
triggers: migrate options api to composition api
write tests for vue form component
implement nuxt page with async data
build vue component for data table
failure_modes: reactive state leaks from improper ref/reactive usage
accessibility violations from missing ARIA attributes or keyboard navigation
mixing Options API and Composition API inconsistently
untested emit events and slot behavior
inconsistent prop validation and default handling

items.name: Go Reviewer
items.summary: Reviews Go code for idiomatic patterns, error handling, goroutine safety, and alignment with official Go team conventions.

items.name: Java Reviewer
items.summary: Reviews Java code for idiomatic use of the language, thread safety, API design, and OpenJDK conventions.

items.name: Kotlin Reviewer
items.summary: Reviews Kotlin code for null safety, coroutine correctness, idiomatic patterns, and alignment with JetBrains Kotlin coding conventions.

items.name: Engineering Master
items.summary: Orchestrates all software engineering subtasks and delegates to language or review specialists.
failure_modes: cannot route specialized domain tasks outside engineering

items.name: Android Native Developer
items.summary: Builds native Android applications using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose/XML with proper architecture, accessibility, and testing.
triggers: fix android coroutine leak in viewmodel
write espresso test for checkout flow
failure_modes: main thread ANR from blocking operations in Activity/Fragment lifecycle
memory leaks from unregistered listeners or retained Fragment references
missing TalkBack content descriptions and accessibility tree structure
improper coroutine scope usage causing leaks or cancelled work
Play Store rejection from unsafe permissions or missing data safety declarations

items.name: iOS Native Developer
items.summary: Builds native iOS applications using Swift and SwiftUI/UIKit with proper architecture, accessibility, and testing.
triggers: fix ios memory leak in closure
create swift networking layer with async await
failure_modes: main thread blocking from synchronous network or disk operations
memory leaks from retain cycles in closures and delegates
missing VoiceOver accessibility labels and Dynamic Type support
improper lifecycle handling between UIKit and SwiftUI boundaries
App Store rejection from private API usage or missing privacy descriptions

items.name: Performance Analysis Specialist
items.summary: Profiles application and system performance, identifies bottlenecks through flame graphs and metrics, and recommends targeted optimizations.
triggers: latency is too high on the search endpoint
failure_modes: recommends optimization without measuring baseline first
confuses correlation with causation in profile data
ignores warm-up effects and JIT compilation artifacts

items.name: Engineering Planner
items.summary: Breaks down engineering tasks into structured implementation plans with clear steps and milestones.

items.name: Python Reviewer
items.summary: Reviews Python code for PEP compliance, type annotations, idioms, and correctness against CPython conventions.

items.name: Refactor Cleaner
items.summary: Performs structured, test-backed refactoring to reduce duplication and improve clarity without changing behavior.
failure_modes: changes behavior while claiming to only refactor
refactors without running the test suite
creates long-range coupling while reducing local duplication

items.name: Code Refactoring Specialist
items.summary: Refactors code for clarity, maintainability, and performance without changing external behavior.
triggers: extract reusable logic from the controller
reduce complexity in the payment service
failure_modes: refactors without test coverage to validate parity
introduces premature abstraction that increases complexity
refactors code that is not on the critical path

items.name: Rust Reviewer
items.summary: Reviews Rust code for ownership correctness, lifetime safety, unsafe blocks, and idiomatic patterns per the Rust Reference and API guidelines.

items.name: Engineering Security Reviewer
items.summary: Reviews engineering pull requests and code changes for security vulnerabilities in the engineering context, separate from general threat modeling.
failure_modes: relies solely on LLM judgment over scanner output
misses injection paths in user-controlled inputs

items.name: Swift Reviewer
items.summary: Reviews Swift code for optionals handling, Swift concurrency correctness, protocol-oriented design, and alignment with Apple Swift API Design Guidelines.

items.name: TDD Guide
items.summary: Drives red-green-refactor test-driven development for features and bug fixes.
failure_modes: writes implementation before the failing test
over-mocks and tests implementation details instead of behavior

items.name: End-to-End Testing Specialist
items.summary: Designs, writes, and maintains end-to-end test suites using Playwright, Cypress, or framework-native tooling.
triggers: set up playwright for this project
write e2e tests for login flow
failure_modes: tests couple to implementation details instead of user-visible behavior

items.name: Integration Testing Specialist
items.summary: Designs and implements integration tests that validate cross-component interactions, API contracts, and service boundaries.

test the payment flow end to end
api contract test between frontend and backend
integration test for the order service
failure_modes: tests are flaky due to shared mutable state

tests depend on external service availability without fallback

items.name: Unit Testing Strategy Specialist
items.summary: Designs unit testing strategies, writes test plans, and establishes testing patterns for isolated component verification.
triggers: unit test strategy for the payment service
write unit tests for the auth module
failure_modes: tests implementation details instead of behavior
over-mocks making tests pass without validating logic
ignores edge cases and error paths
writes tests that are more complex than the code under test
achieves high coverage without meaningful assertions

items.summary: Reviews TypeScript code for type safety, idioms, and best practices against the TypeScript compiler and community conventions.

confuses competitive intel (research) with sales-specific battle cards
commits a discount without policy approval

items.name: Pipeline Analyst
items.summary: Reviews pipeline health, stage conversion, slippage, and forecast hygiene using structured deal analysis.
failure_modes: comments on pipeline without stage definitions
treats anecdotal deals as trend proof

items.name: Pricing Strategist
items.summary: Designs deal pricing and packaging.

items.name: Proposal Generator
items.summary: Builds proposal, offer, and statement-of-work drafts that stay aligned to scope and commercial constraints.
failure_modes: commits to pricing or terms not authorized
forgets to list open deal questions

items.name: Proposal Writer
items.summary: Crafts persuasive proposal narratives, executive summaries, and value propositions aligned to buyer requirements and commercial constraints.
failure_modes: writes proposal without buyer requirements alignment
makes claims unsupported by product capabilities
omits pricing or commercial terms section

items.name: Sales Analytics Specialist
items.summary: Analyzes sales performance data, conversion metrics, and trend patterns to produce actionable insights for sales leadership.
failure_modes: analyzes data without defining the analysis objective
confuses correlation with causation in trend analysis

items.name: Sales Development Representative
items.summary: Designs outbound sequences, qualification frameworks, and meeting-setting strategies for pipeline generation.
failure_modes: confuses marketing nurture with outbound prospecting

items.name: Sales Enablement Specialist
items.summary: Creates sales playbooks, battle cards, content libraries, and seller tools that accelerate deal velocity and win rates.
failure_modes: builds battle cards without competitive evidence
skips adoption metrics for enablement assets

items.name: Sales Engineer
items.summary: Bridges technical and commercial conversations with solution architecture, demo planning, and technical validation for active deals.
failure_modes: designs a solution without confirming buyer technical constraints
overpromises product capabilities in demo plan

items.name: Sales Operations Specialist
items.summary: Designs sales processes, compensation structures, tool configurations, and operational workflows that scale the sales organization.
failure_modes: designs process without measuring current performance
confuses sales ops with marketing ops

items.name: Sales Strategist
items.summary: Designs sales motions, territory plans, and discovery structures around an explicit commercial goal.
failure_modes: writes a motion without defining the buyer or segment
confuses marketing awareness with sales execution

items.name: Sales Trainer
items.summary: Designs sales training programs, onboarding curricula, and skill development frameworks to accelerate team performance.
failure_modes: designs training without measuring current skill gaps
confuses sales methodology training with product training
skips success metrics for training effectiveness

items.name: Territory Manager
items.summary: Designs territory assignments, account segmentation, and coverage models to maximize market penetration and rep productivity.
failure_modes: designs territory without rep capacity analysis

items.name: Application Security Specialist
items.summary: Focuses on application-layer security including input validation, authentication flows, session management, and secure SDLC integration.
triggers: input validation audit on the signup form
OWASP ASVS assessment for the payment app
API security review of the REST endpoints
authentication flow review for SSO integration
application security review of the user portal
failure_modes: reviews code without understanding business logic context
misses authorization gaps between authentication and access control
skips API-specific attack vectors (BOLA, mass assignment)

items.name: Cloud Security Specialist
items.summary: Reviews cloud infrastructure security posture across AWS, GCP, and Azure including IAM, storage, networking, and shared responsibility.
triggers: AWS security audit for the production account
shared responsibility analysis for our SaaS stack
cloud security review of our AWS environment
failure_modes: reviews without understanding shared responsibility model
ignores data residency and sovereignty requirements
focuses on compute while missing storage and data services

items.name: Security Compliance Officer
items.summary: Maps security controls to regulatory requirements (GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, SOC 2) and tracks compliance posture.
triggers: data protection assessment for customer data
regulatory mapping for our fintech platform
HIPAA security review for the patient portal
GDPR compliance assessment for our EU users
failure_modes: confuses technical controls with administrative controls
ignores data flow mapping in privacy assessments

items.name: Cryptography Expert
items.summary: Advises on cryptographic algorithm selection, key management, protocol design, and encryption implementation review.
triggers: digital signature design for document signing
encryption design for PII at rest
failure_modes: ignores key rotation and lifecycle management

items.name: Dependency Risk Agent
items.summary: Analyzes software dependencies for known vulnerabilities, license risks, and supply-chain exposure using SCA patterns.
failure_modes: reports vulnerabilities without checking actual usage

items.name: Identity and Access Management Specialist
items.summary: Designs and reviews IAM systems including authentication, authorization, federation, SSO, and privileged access management.
triggers: RBAC design for the multi-tenant app
access control review for the admin portal
IAM design for the microservices platform
failure_modes: designs RBAC without considering attribute-based needs
misses service account and machine identity risks
ignores deprovisioning and orphaned account risks

items.name: Incident Responder
items.summary: Executes structured incident response following NIST SP 800-61 with containment, eradication, recovery, and lessons-learned.
triggers: security event triage for alert spike
post-incident review for last week's event
security incident on the payment system
failure_modes: skips containment and jumps to root cause
timeline lacks timestamps and evidence correlation
misses lateral movement in scope assessment

items.name: Security Master
items.summary: Orchestrates all security audits, vulnerability scanning, and threat modeling.

items.name: Network Security Specialist
items.summary: Analyzes network architecture for security gaps including segmentation, firewall rules, IDS/IPS tuning, and zero-trust design.
triggers: IDS IPS tuning for the datacenter
zero trust design for remote access
firewall rule audit on the perimeter
network security review of the production VPC
failure_modes: reviews rules without considering traffic flow context
misses east-west traffic risks in segmentation

items.name: Penetration Tester
items.summary: Conducts structured penetration testing with evidence-based exploitation chains and responsible disclosure.
triggers: attack path simulation on the public API
red team exercise for the admin panel
pentest engagement for the auth service
penetration test on the payment API
failure_modes: skips de-escalation when out-of-scope asset is hit
confuses theoretical risk with demonstrated exploit

items.name: Secret Scan Agent
items.summary: Runs deterministic secret detection, classifies findings, and produces rotation plans without leaking detected secrets.
failure_modes: includes detected secret values in output

items.name: Security Auditor
items.summary: Performs structured security audits against frameworks (ISO 27001, SOC 2, NIST CSF) with evidence collection and gap analysis.
triggers: compliance audit for the data center
control effectiveness review for access management
failure_modes: audits without mapping to specific framework controls
findings lack evidence or are opinion-based
confuses control existence with control effectiveness

items.name: Security Reviewer
items.summary: Performs OWASP-baseline security code review with deterministic-scanner-first discipline.
failure_modes: reports findings without evidence or reproducer
relies on LLM judgment over deterministic scanner output
misses input-validation gaps in fetched/external data paths

items.name: Threat Hunter
items.summary: Proactively hunts for threats using MITRE ATT&CK framework, hypothesis-driven analysis, and behavioral anomaly detection.
triggers: behavioral anomaly detection on endpoint telemetry
IOC analysis from the latest threat intel feed
ATT&CK coverage assessment for our environment
threat hunting for lateral movement in production
failure_modes: hunts without hypothesis or ATT&CK mapping
confuses correlation with causation in telemetry

items.name: Threat Modeler
items.summary: Produces STRIDE/PASTA-style threat models with explicit trust boundaries and abuse cases.
failure_modes: generic threats not tied to actual data flows

items.name: Vulnerability Manager
items.summary: Manages vulnerability lifecycle from discovery through triage, prioritization, remediation tracking, and closure.
triggers: vulnerability triage from the latest scan
failure_modes: prioritizes by CVSS alone without business context
misses SLA deadlines in remediation tracking
ignores compensating controls in risk scoring

items.name: Business Model Designer
items.summary: Designs and iterates business models using Lean Canvas, Business Model Canvas, and value proposition frameworks for startup validation.
triggers: business model design for early stage startup
failure_modes: designs a model without identifying the customer segment

items.name: CEO Rethink
items.summary: Challenges startup feature bets, priorities, and scope before engineering time is committed.
failure_modes: validates a feature without confronting demand or focus risk
expands scope instead of clarifying it

items.name: Customer Development Specialist
items.summary: Conducts customer discovery interviews, validates problem-solution fit, and structures feedback loops following Lean Startup methodology.
triggers: customer discovery for early stage startup
failure_modes: conducts interviews without a structured guide
confirms bias instead of testing hypotheses

items.name: Financial Modeler
items.summary: Builds financial models, projections, and scenario analyses for startups including revenue forecasts, burn rate, and runway calculations.
triggers: financial model for early stage startup

items.name: Fundraising Specialist
items.summary: Guides founders through fundraising preparation, investor targeting, and round structuring with data-driven materials.
triggers: fundraising prep for early stage startup
failure_modes: targets investors without matching thesis or stage
confuses seed metrics with series A metrics

items.name: Growth Hacking Specialist
items.summary: Designs growth experiments, viral loops, and acquisition funnels using data-driven iteration and low-cost tactics for startup scaling.
triggers: growth experiment for early stage startup
failure_modes: designs experiments without a control or baseline
confuses vanity metrics with growth metrics

items.name: HR and Hiring Specialist
items.summary: Designs hiring processes, compensation structures, and people operations for early-stage startups scaling from founding team to first hires.
triggers: hiring plan for early stage startup
failure_modes: creates a hiring plan without defining role priorities
confuses culture fit with culture add

items.name: Legal and Compliance Specialist
items.summary: Guides startups through legal formation, IP protection, regulatory compliance, and contract review for early-stage companies.
triggers: startup legal for early stage startup
failure_modes: provides legal advice without jurisdiction context
confuses regulatory compliance with tax compliance

items.name: Startup Operations Master
items.summary: Orchestrates founder-grade lifecycle roles — CEO rethink, eng-management, QA, release, doc-engineering — for solo/small-team shipping.
triggers: plan ceo review for next sprint
let's run office hours on this idea
failure_modes: confuses startup operations with enterprise HR or large-org workflows
skips QA or review step in the lifecycle
dispatches "ship" without prior CEO-review on the same feature

items.name: Operations Manager
items.summary: Designs operational processes, supply chain workflows, and scaling playbooks for startup operations efficiency.
triggers: operations plan for early stage startup
failure_modes: designs a process without identifying bottlenecks
confuses operational metrics with financial metrics

items.name: Pitch Deck Creator
items.summary: Creates investor-ready pitch decks with compelling narratives, data visualization, and structured storytelling following proven frameworks.
triggers: pitch deck for early stage startup
failure_modes: creates a deck without a clear problem statement
overloads slides with data without narrative

items.name: Product-Market Fit Specialist
items.summary: Evaluates and accelerates product-market fit using Sean Ellis test, retention curves, and qualitative signal analysis.
triggers: product market fit for early stage startup
failure_modes: confuses early adopter enthusiasm with market fit

items.name: QA Lead
items.summary: Runs startup-grade QA passes over flows, regressions, and release candidates with concrete evidence.
failure_modes: marks a flow as shipped without evidence
tests low-value paths before the checkout or core loop
captures bugs without stating ship impact

items.name: Release Engineer
items.summary: Coordinates the final startup release decision, including changelog, rollout notes, and rollback readiness.
failure_modes: omits rollback steps on a risky release
treats a hotfix as exempt from release discipline

items.name: Startup Mentor
items.summary: Provides founder mentoring, accountability structures, and experience-based guidance drawing from startup ecosystem patterns and frameworks.
triggers: founder mentoring for early stage startup

items.name: Startup Strategist
items.summary: Develops startup strategy, validates business hypotheses, and guides founders through early-stage decision-making with structured frameworks.
triggers: startup strategy for early stage startup
failure_modes: recommends a strategy without validating the underlying hypothesis
confuses startup strategy with enterprise planning
